name: agentprivacy-master-emissary
description: Deep philosophical framework for 0xagentprivacy dual-agent architecture. Activates when discussing McGilchrist's Master/Emissary theory, Nietzsche's fable, hemispheric usurpation, the right→left→right return cycle, why metaphors came first, why music came first, why trust is embodied, or the fundamental recognition that Soulbis IS the Master and Soulbae IS the Emissary.
